name: ConsentBanner

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the banner's root role="region" element (the preferences dialog is unaffected).

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the banner's root role="region" element.

parameters.name: Categories
parameters.description: Consent buckets to expose in the preferences dialog. Omit `Required: true` ones if your site doesn't use strictly-necessary cookies.

parameters.name: PrivacyPolicyUrl
parameters.description: URL to your privacy policy page. If null, the link is hidden.

parameters.name: PolicyVersion
parameters.description: Privacy-policy version this banner asks consent for. When a stored decision was recorded against a different version, the banner re-prompts (previous choices prefill the preferences dialog, but the user must re-confirm). Bump this whenever your policy materially changes. Defaults to "1".

parameters.name: Title
parameters.description: Banner heading, shown next to the cookie icon.

parameters.name: Description
parameters.default: "We use a minimal set of cookies to run the site and optionally measure anonymous usage to improve it. You choose what's on."
parameters.description: Banner body text, followed by the privacy-policy link when PrivacyPolicyUrl is set.

parameters.name: PrivacyPolicyLabel
parameters.description: Link text for the privacy-policy link (only shown when PrivacyPolicyUrl is set).

parameters.name: AcceptLabel
parameters.description: Label for the layer-1 "accept everything" button.

parameters.name: RejectLabel
parameters.description: Label for the layer-1 "reject optional categories" button.

parameters.name: CustomizeLabel
parameters.description: Label for the button that opens the preferences dialog; only rendered when at least one non-required category exists.

parameters.name: PreferencesDescription
parameters.default: "Pick which categories you're okay with. You can change this later."
parameters.description: Body text of the preferences dialog.

parameters.name: RequiredBadge
parameters.description: Badge text shown next to a category that is Required: true (always on, not toggleable).

parameters.name: CancelLabel
parameters.description: Label for the preferences dialog's cancel button (discards draft changes).

parameters.name: SaveLabel
parameters.description: Label for the preferences dialog's save button (commits the draft toggles).

parameters.name: AnimationClass
parameters.description: CSS animation class applied to the banner on mount (default a slide-in from the bottom edge).

mdSummary:
# ConsentBanner

Consent Banner component.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Utility
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/consent-banner

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| ConsentBanner | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the banner's root role="region" element (the preferences dialog is unaffected). |
| ConsentBanner | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Unmatched attributes splatted onto the banner's root role="region" element. |
| ConsentBanner | Categories | `IReadOnlyList<Lumeo.Services.ConsentCategory>` | `DefaultCategories` | Consent buckets to expose in the preferences dialog. Omit `Required: true` ones if your site doesn't use strictly-necessary cookies. |
| ConsentBanner | PrivacyPolicyUrl | `string?` | `` | URL to your privacy policy page. If null, the link is hidden. |
| ConsentBanner | PolicyVersion | `string` | `"1"` | Privacy-policy version this banner asks consent for. When a stored decision was recorded against a different version, the banner re-prompts (previous choices prefill the preferences dialog, but the user must re-confirm). Bump this whenever your policy materially changes. Defaults to "1". |
| ConsentBanner | Title | `string` | `"Cookies & consent"` | Banner heading, shown next to the cookie icon. |
| ConsentBanner | Description | `string` | `"We use a minimal set of cookies to run the site and optionally measure anonymous usage to improve it. You choose what's on."` | Banner body text, followed by the privacy-policy link when PrivacyPolicyUrl is set. |
| ConsentBanner | PrivacyPolicyLabel | `string` | `"Read the privacy policy"` | Link text for the privacy-policy link (only shown when PrivacyPolicyUrl is set). |
| ConsentBanner | AcceptLabel | `string` | `"Accept all"` | Label for the layer-1 "accept everything" button. |
| ConsentBanner | RejectLabel | `string` | `"Reject optional"` | Label for the layer-1 "reject optional categories" button. |
| ConsentBanner | CustomizeLabel | `string` | `"Customize"` | Label for the button that opens the preferences dialog; only rendered when at least one non-required category exists. |
| ConsentBanner | PreferencesTitle | `string` | `"Consent preferences"` | Heading of the preferences dialog. |
| ConsentBanner | PreferencesDescription | `string` | `"Pick which categories you're okay with. You can change this later."` | Body text of the preferences dialog. |
| ConsentBanner | RequiredBadge | `string` | `"Required"` | Badge text shown next to a category that is Required: true (always on, not toggleable). |
| ConsentBanner | CancelLabel | `string` | `"Cancel"` | Label for the preferences dialog's cancel button (discards draft changes). |
| ConsentBanner | SaveLabel | `string` | `"Save preferences"` | Label for the preferences dialog's save button (commits the draft toggles). |
| ConsentBanner | AnimationClass | `string` | `"animate-slide-in-from-bottom"` | CSS animation class applied to the banner on mount (default a slide-in from the bottom edge). |

## Slots
- (none)

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- `ConsentService` (Lumeo.Services)
- `IComponentInteropService` ()

## Keyboard
- `Escape` — HandlePrefKeyDown handles Escape in ConsentBanner.razor

## Example
```razor
<ConsentBanner />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-accent`, `--color-background`, `--color-border`, `--color-foreground`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-popover`, `--color-popover-foreground`, `--color-primary`, `--color-primary-foreground`, `--color-ring`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/ConsentBanner/ConsentBanner.razor`
